subcodes.first_line: O thou firm and growing one! Motion is the necessary law of the realities of being and conducive to the realization of universal benefits
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت حرکت از لوازم حقائق موجودات است و سبب حصول فوائد کلیه در عالم
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
